Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is granted. Allowing the filing of the cross-complaint is in the interests of justice and judicial economy and does not prejudice the proposed cross-defendants. The proposed cross-defendants are already parties to this action and the trial is months away.
ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
